message:
feat(search): add embedder factory and improve search configuration

Search Module Improvements
===========================

This commit enhances the search subsystem with a configurable embedder
factory, proper respect for search configuration settings, and improved
robustness when handling large skill registries.

Changes in src/search/embeddings.rs:
- Add build_embedder() factory function that creates embedders based on config:
  * "" | "hash" → HashEmbedder (default, zero dependencies)
  * "local" → Returns config error (not yet implemented)
  * "api" → Returns config error (not yet implemented)
- Validates embedding_dims > 0 to prevent runtime errors
- Returns Box<dyn Embedder> for runtime polymorphism
- Enables future support for ML-based embedders without code changes

Changes in src/search/mod.rs:
- Re-export build_embedder() in the public API

Changes in src/cli/commands/search.rs:
- Update help text for --layer flag to document new terminology:
  "base, org, project, user (aliases: system, global, local)"
- Add validation check: if semantic search is requested but
  use_embeddings=false in config, return helpful error message
- For hybrid search, automatically fall back to bm25-only when
  embeddings are disabled in config
- Replace HashEmbedder::default() with build_embedder() factory calls
  to respect config settings
- Use config.search.bm25_weight and semantic_weight for RRF fusion
  instead of hardcoded defaults
- Add load_all_skills() helper function with pagination to handle
  registries with more than 1000 skills (previous limit was hardcoded)
- Fix potential silent truncation of large skill sets
- Update layer color display: base=blue, org=green, project=yellow, user=magenta

These changes make the search system more configurable, more robust with
large datasets, and properly aligned with the new layer terminology.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
